title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: What to know about Netflix’s landmark acquisition of Warner Bros.
items.description: Learn more about Netflix's acquisition of Warner Bros., considered the most historic megadeal in Hollywood, as it continues to develop.

items.title: YouTube rolls out an AI playlist generator for Premium users

items.title: Vega raises $120M Series B to rethink how enterprises detect cyber threats

items.title: Samsung Galaxy A17 5G Review: Crippling Performance
items.description: It’' a decent value for a $200, but unreliable performance makes this Samsung smartphone tough to recommend.

items.title: Even Realities G2 Review: Smarter Glasses
items.description: These second-generation smart glasses give you superpowers—if the software behaves.

items.title: YouTubers aren’t relying on ad revenue anymore — here’s how some are diversifying
items.description: YouTubers are no longer just creators, and in some cases, their side businesses are growing faster than their channels.

items.title: Bidets Are Confusing Visitors at the 2026 Winter Olympics
items.description: Bidets are extremely common in northern Italy, where the Milano Cortina Games are being played. They’re less familiar to the people visiting.

items.description: These portable heaters will heat a room quickly, quietly, and safely.

items.title: Trump EPA reportedly seeks to revoke landmark air pollution rule
items.description: EPA administrator Lee Zeldin is reportedly expected to repeal the 2009 "endangerment finding" that underpins U.S. climate regulatory efforts.

items.title: Google expands tools to let users remove sensitive data about themselves from Search
items.description: Users will be able to more easily request the removal of results that include private information or non-consensual explicit imagery.
